task_completion.description: Open the Degen Geom analysis tool in OpenVSP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP application window is visible with the 'Degen Geom' analysis dialog box open.

task_completion.description: Export the Degen Geom results to the specified CSV file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or OpenVSP dialog showing the file 'eCRM001_degengeom.csv' successfully created or saved in '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/'.

task_completion.description: Parse or view the exported CSV file to extract the required metrics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application, text editor, or terminal output displaying the contents of 'eCRM001_degengeom.csv', specifically showing the rows/columns for the Wing component.

task_completion.description: Write the extracted metrics to the structured report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing the file '/home/ga/Desktop/degengeom_report.txt' containing the four required metrics: total projected wingspan, total projected planform area, mean aerodynamic chord (MAC), and aspect ratio.

task_completion.description: Convert and report the metrics in metric units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values in the report file must be in metric units (e.g., meters) and match the expected converted values: Span ~11.48m, Area ~15.87 sq meters, Aspect Ratio ~8.31, and MAC ~1.4m.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP GUI to generate the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the OpenVSP menus (Analysis > Degen Geom) and clicking execute/export, rather than faking the CSV creation via terminal.

integrity.description: The agent extracted the data from the actual CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen opening the CSV, running a script to parse it, or using terminal commands (like grep/awk) on the CSV file before writing the final report.

integrity.description: The agent calculated the metric conversions rather than hallucinating the final answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of a script, calculator usage, or terminal math operations converting the native inch values from the CSV into meters/square meters.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The native OpenVSP model is in inches. The main 'Wing' component (ID XIUYSEMJCT) has the following approximate metric values: Span = 11.48 meters, Area = 15.87 square meters, Aspect Ratio = 8.31, MAC = 1.4 meters. The agent must explicitly convert the raw CSV values (which are in inches) to these metric values in the final report. The evaluation framework may use /tmp/openvsp_degengeom_analysis_result.json to collect the final submission.
